channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports

item.title: Robbie Gould announced as head football coach at Saint Viator HS
item.description: Former Chicago Bears kicker and franchise great Robbie Gould has been named the new head football coach at Saint Viator High School in Arlington Heights, and will begin his role immediately.
item.dc:creator: Eli Ong, WGN 9

item.title: Analysis: After Juan Soto's megadeal, could MLB see a $1 billion contract? Probably not soon
item.description: For the second straight Major League Baseball offseason, a norm-shattering contract has been the talk of the winter, with Juan Soto agreeing with the New York Mets on a $765 million, 15-year deal that's the richest in baseball history.
item.dc:creator: DAVID BRANDT, Associated Press, PIX 11

item.title: Mets nab Yankees star player in free agency
item.description: NEW YORK (PIX11) -- Juan Soto is a Met. The 15-year deal is worth $765 million and could be worth up to $805 million. Ridiculous. Mets owner Steve Cohen was always going to have the highest offer and the Yankees entered a battle where money was the ultimate factor. They were never going to win.
item.dc:creator: Marc Malusis, PIX 11

item.title: Joe Burrow's house burglarized while playing Cowboys on Monday night: report
item.description: Cincinnati Bengals star quarterback Joe Burrow's house was reportedly broken into while he was playing the Dallas Cowboys on "Monday Night Football.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: SHR closure leads to a seat shakeup in NASCAR. A look at who is driving where in 2025
item.description: CHARLOTTE, N.C. (AP) — There won't be a Stewart-Haas Racing in NASCAR next season now that Hall of Famer Tony Stewart has left the series and the four-car organization he co-owned with Formula 1 team owner Gene Haas.
item.dc:creator: JENNA FRYER, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Miami's Ward, Oregon's Gabriel, Colorado's Hunter, Boise State’s Jeanty, are named Heisman finalists
item.description: Oregon's Dillon Gabriel, Colorado's Travis Hunter, Boise State’s Ashton Jeanty, and Miami's Cam Ward were announced as the Heisman Trophy finalists on Monday night.
item.dc:creator: ERIC OLSON AP College Football Writer, WFLA, NBC

item.title: Arlington Heights village board unanimously approves tax deal with Bears, 3 local school districts
item.description: The Village of Arlington Heights Board of Trustees is set to vote on a tentative property tax deal with the Chicago Bears and three local school districts, which would save the Bears $5.4 million a year in property taxes and establish a timeline for the Bears to decide on building a new stadium in t
item.dc:creator: Dana Rebik, WGN 9

item.title: 49ers beat the Bears 38-13 to snap 3-game skid
item.description: SANTA CLARA, Calif. (AP) — After weeks of shaky play, the San Francisco 49ers got back to their old form with one of the most dominant first halves in years.
item.dc:creator: The Associated Press, KRON4

item.title: Scottie Scheffler ends his big year in the Bahamas with his 9th victory
item.description:
Scottie Scheffler returned from a two-month break and nothing changed. He won the Hero World Challenge on Sunday with a 9-under 63 to tie the tournament record at Albany Golf Club and win by six shots.
Scheffler, the first player since Tiger Woods in 2009 to spend an entire calendar year at No.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: Tua Tagovailoa's TD pass to Jonnu Smith gives Dolphins 32-26 overtime win over Aaron Rodgers, Jets
item.description: Tagovailoa sealed it with a 10-yard touchdown pass to Jonnu Smith in overtime to help the Dolphins spoil Rodgers' first 300-yard passing game in nearly three years and beat the Jets for the ninth straight time in Miami.
item.dc:creator: ALANIS THAMES, Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: Utes QB Isaac Wilson enters transfer portal
item.description: SALT LAKE CITY (ABC4 Sports) - Utes freshman quarterback Isaac Wilson announced on Sunday that he is entering the transfer portal after one season. Wilson threw for 1,510 yards and 10 touchdowns as a freshman, starting seven games in place of injured starter Cam Rising.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4
